TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rob_Adams_(actor), title = Rob_Adams_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rob_Adams_(actor)} }

S.FORM: Rob Adams kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 2, Rob Adams, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Rob Adams kawas tay 1970, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 2, Rob Adams, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: roβ a*ams~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, roβ a*ams~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
